programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Mystery drama with Eric Mabius. The Postables find a letter in an antique vase, which could be sold to save a family's farm. But the vase's suspicious origin leaves them with a moral dilemma... (2017)
Realising a psychologist is manipulating her mind, Elaine must escape from his clutches before she becomes another casualty in his psychotic study. Starring Kristen Vaganos (2021).
Thriller with Jordan Ladd. Years after a violent attack forced her to retire, an opera singer faces her fears at a comeback event. But as new dangers emerge, will this performance be her last (2017)?

...the Knife: Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke. When a US Senator dies after an operation, Dr Mark Sloan suspects foul play by the surgeon, his old flame Dr Rachel Walters but can he prove it? (1993)
Training Video: Mary shares her expertise with a film crew making a training video for U.S. Marshals. Marshall makes arrangements for an elderly mobster in WITSEC to go to his son's funeral.
The Blame Game: Alexis and the 12th precinct must race to save Castle and Beckett after they're abducted and forced to solve a number of disturbing puzzles to slowly gain back their freedom.
Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke and Barry Van Dyke. Dr Mark Sloan and his son are in a race against time to make a diagnosis when a group of farm workers are struck down by a deadly virus... (2002)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Crime mystery with Dick Van Dyke and Barry Van Dyke. Dr Mark Sloan and his son are in a race against time to make a diagnosis when a group of farm workers are struck down by a deadly virus... (2002)
Till Death Do Us Part: Dr Sloan investigates when his friend, the father-of-the-bride, is murdered on his daughter's wedding day.
Wrong Number: Dr Sloan is drawn into an abduction investigation when a kidnapper mistakenly contacts him demanding a large ransom for a young child.
Moving Violation: Sheriff Metzger finds himself under mounting political pressure after arresting the son of a U.S Ambassador. Will Jessica's investigation clear the Sheriff of murder?
Who Killed J.B. Fletcher?: Jessica finds herself involved in a surreal investigation when members of a small Texan town die in suspicious circumstances.
To Grandmother's House We Go: As Bobby sets his sights on solving a bank robbery, Lucy sets out to stop a crooked contractor from taking possession of her elderly grandmother's home.
And Justice For All: Castle goes undercover in a Language School to investigate the murder of a student. He soon learns that language isn't the only barrier to solving this mysterious case.
Till Death: Carrie and Al go undercover to catch a serial killer who has been targeting wealthy married couples.
Let's Get It Ahn: A counterfeiter witness is implicated in a murder. Mary and Marshall become suspicious of the clues, which seem fake, and wonder if there's a deeper conspiracy at hand.
...Real Murders: Crime mystery starring Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. Librarian crime buff Aurora is dragged into a terrifying game when a copycat killer targets the Real Murders Club. (2015)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

programmes.show_description: ...Hart Is: Mystery with Robert Wagner and Stefanie Powers. Back in Jennifer's home town, the Harts stumble on a smuggling ring and find that some small-town secrets won't stay buried. (1994)
Thriller with Twin Peaks star Mädchen Amick. A private investigator helps a women discover the truth about her husband's apparent suicide. (2005)
Thriller starring Kate Drummond. A high school senior is blackmailed into taking her cousin's college entrance exam, risking everything to keep her secret safe (2020).

The Family Jewels: Jessica is embroiled in a murder investigation after a chauffeur is killed during a fundraiser. Will an extramarital affair lead Jessica to the murderer?
A Body To Die For: Can Jessica unearth whether a local fitness instructor is responsible for the murder of a visiting con artist?
The Return Of Preston Giles: Jessica is asked to come to the rescue of her former publisher Preston Giles, after he is accused of murder.
The Great Twain Robbery: Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton is asked to investigate when a recently discovered Mark Twain manuscript leads to murder.
